observation: Creator capsule routes now cover 10 retained surfaces with standardized vision QA, a unified regression orchestrator, a Darwin autonomy pre-flight check, and multi-surface proof infrastructure. The Darwin autonomy pre-flight catches wrong-repo anchor, dirty worktree, and MCP gaps before autonomous cron slices execute — directly addressing the recurring failure modes documented in hermes-gsd-evolution pitfalls. Remaining gap: surface parity drift between WORKFLOW_INDEX, retained_routes, and examples/*.html.
population: creator capsule proof/check surface mutations for catching drift and maintaining cross-repo consistency across autonomous Darwin runs
selection_pressure: help a creator verify all surfaces in one pass, pre-flight the execution environment, and keep docs, examples, and checks in sync without manual inspection

candidates.mutation: Add a machine check (bun creator:multi-surface-proof) that validates every retained surface HTML artifact against measure:check + print:render in one pass, using the existing fixed-canvas contracts. This is the artifact-measurement companion to the regression orchestrator.
candidates.phenotype: scripts/creator-multi-surface-proof.ts that iterates over all 11 retained surface HTML files, runs measure:check and print:render for each, and reports overflow/render completeness with per-surface PASS/FAIL and timing
candidates.risk: Depends on Playwright Chromium being installed for measure:check and print:render. Must stay in sync with WORKFLOW_INDEX surface entries; must not hardcode paths that change. Canvas sizes must match per-surface contracts (1684x1191 default, 1200x630 for social-card).

candidates.mutation: Add a parity check (bun creator:docs-surface-parity) that validates WORKFLOW_INDEX.md surface entries, mutation-candidates.json retained_routes, and examples/*.html files are in sync — catching the recurring docs/surface drift failure mode.
candidates.phenotype: scripts/creator-docs-surface-parity.ts that cross-references WORKFLOW_INDEX.md table entries, retained_routes in the candidate ledger, and actual examples/*.html files for creator surfaces, reporting any missing/mismatched entries
candidates.risk: Must parse WORKFLOW_INDEX.md markdown table reliably; must handle new surface additions gracefully.

candidates.mutation: Add a slice health check (bun creator:cron-slice-health) that validates the most recent autonomous Darwin cron slice completed cleanly — verifies PR state, branch SHA, CI status, and merge evidence for the last Darwin PR on the repo.
candidates.phenotype: scripts/creator-cron-slice-health.ts that queries GitHub API for recent Darwin PRs, checks CI/merge state on the most recent, and reports slice completion evidence (branch, SHA, PR URL, merge status, CI verdict)
candidates.risk: Requires GitHub API access (gh or GITHUB_TOKEN). Must handle no-Darwin-PR-yet gracefully (first-run state). Must not leak private repo details in output.

retained_routes.retained_as: generated TouchDesigner/twozero topology and safety handoff
standardized browser DOM/vision QA evidence for TouchDesigner surface (provider-fallback pattern, real browser_console DOM verification, needle-aligned QA)
unified regression orchestrator (16-check surface + autonomy + hackathon:score in one pass)
Darwin autonomy pre-flight check (repo anchor, git cleanliness, MCP connectivity, baseline gates)

retention: Retain creator-darwin-autonomy-route as the Darwin autonomy pre-flight gate: validates repo anchor (correct repo + remote), git cleanliness (reports uncommitted changes), MCP connectivity (research_vault), and baseline gates (creator:mutation-check) before autonomous cron slices execute. Promoted from active candidate to retained route. Replaced in candidates[] by creator-cron-slice-health-route (validates prior Darwin slice completion).
